heading: Access to certain information
label: 721 Access to certain information

children.label: a
children.text: No provision of the Social Security Act, including section 453() of that Act (()), shall be construed to limit, amend, or supersede the authority of the Comptroller General to obtain any information or to inspect any record under .ll42 U.S.C. 653section 716 of this title

children.label: b
children.text: The specific reference to a statute in subsection (a) shall not be construed to affect access by the Government Accountability Office to information under statutes that are not so referenced.
